text.message: Green, I want the 11 3 desert. Can we make a deal?
blue really trying to sell that wood lol
blue I can give you this + insurance
you could have traded on my turn
if yes i woulhd have 8 cards man
green what you need to get 11 3?
sorry red. I really needed that port
I have a city on the 9
if you needed it so bad, you'd have prioritized it
dunking on last place isnt the flex you think it is
dude you plowed me, dont be obnoxious on top of it
green will try to go for army
sorry. It was very good for me
dude it's fine if you think that (you're wrong)
dont pretend im so strong when my position sucks this bad. that's so obnoxious
sorry red. I understand that you are angry with me
if you thought the sheep port was so good, you take it first. tehre's a reason you pointed to 11 3
sheep port was your third best settlement
blue if i cant build he got army
I know but you would be extra strong with that man
stop pretending the only player without a city is winning
table talking about me in my terrible position after you plow me is toxic
Green is crushing and blue also
i thought i was super strong
the port was great for me
so am i super strong or not dude?
i thought i was the strong one?
or was that just some bs you were spewing
you were if you had that spot
no. you said i was "still" super strong
you were but now blue got a city
i was the ONLY one that didnt
the talk is over. I will mute you and report you
just crazy to say I was so strong AFTER the plow and while i was the only one with no city
I am afraid red hasnt played knights
I told him his set up was great
if he would hit you more blue he would win for sure
but the guy was super tox ic
